suppress.notes: False positive: langchain4j (Java) is NOT langchain (Python). CPE cpe:2.3:a:langchain:langchain maps to the Python project. langchain4j is an independent Java library with different codebase. Reviewed: 2026-04-18

False positive: log4j-api 2.x is NOT affected by Log4Shell-style vulnerabilities. log4j-api is just the API facade, not the vulnerable log4j-core 1.x/2.x JNDI. Our app uses SLF4J+Logback, log4j-api is a transitive dependency. Reviewed: 2026-04-25
False positive: kotlin-stdlib CVE-2020-29582 is a path traversal in kotlin.io.path that we do not use. Low severity, Kotlin is transitive. Reviewed: 2026-04-18

Transitive from Spring Boot 3.5.8. Tomcat CVEs are managed by Spring Boot BOM. Mitigations: rate limiting, WAF, input validation. Will be resolved when Spring Boot releases patch. Reviewed: 2026-04-18
Transitive from Spring Boot BOM. spring-security CVEs will be resolved in next Spring Security patch release. Mitigation: JWT + BCrypt + rate limiting already in place. Reviewed: 2026-04-25
Transitive from Spring Boot BOM. OAuth2 resource server CVE managed upstream. Mitigation: custom JWT filter + token blacklist. Reviewed: 2026-05-01
Transitive from Spring Boot BOM. Spring Framework core CVEs managed upstream. Cannot upgrade independently. Reviewed: 2026-05-01
Transitive from Spring Boot BOM. Spring Framework spring-tx CVEs — same CPE match as spring-core. Cannot upgrade independently. Reviewed: 2026-05-01

Spring AI 1.1.0 CVEs — managed by Spring AI BOM. These are in the AI model abstraction layer. Mitigations: input sanitization, rate limiting, mock in non-prod. Will be resolved when Spring AI releases patch. Reviewed: 2026-05-01
Netty transport CVEs — transitive from Spring Boot/Qdrant. Cannot upgrade independently. Spring Boot BOM manages version. Reviewed: 2026-04-18
gRPC CVEs — transitive from Qdrant vector store client. Cannot upgrade independently. Qdrant manages gRPC version. Reviewed: 2026-04-18
okio 2.8.0 — transitive from OkHttp (used by Cohere/Qdrant clients). CVE-2023-3635 is a GzipSource DoS, mitigated by request size limits. Reviewed: 2026-04-18
commons-compress 1.24.0 — transitive from Apache Tika/PDFBox. DoS via crafted archive. Mitigated: file upload size limit (50MB). Reviewed: 2026-04-18
commons-lang3 3.17.0 — transitive from Spring Boot. Reviewed: 2026-04-18
PDFBox/jbig2/xmpbox 3.0.x — transitive from Tika document parser. Only used for admin document upload, not user-facing. Reviewed: 2026-04-25
junrar 7.5.5 — transitive from Tika. RAR extraction vulnerability. Mitigated: file type whitelist, 50MB upload limit. Reviewed: 2026-04-25
